title: Monkeys ire
wikitext:
[]: Monkey's ire             Quote Post by Dave » Wed May 04, 2005 4:06 pm OR: How I learned to stop worrying and love the Fans. Are some fans a little 'too' enthuisiastic about this show? Is wanting to be stranded alone on a desert Island with Anno just plain wrong? Do those blithering idiots who dress up as the NERV bridge crew ruin it for the rest of us? Or are some people just too easily offended? Personally, I have no problem with fans who are obsessed to the point of insanity; hell, I'm practically there myself. Its not as if the 100+ Shinji/Rei fanfics they wrote actually alter the very fabric of space a time, rewriting the scripts to the show. However, some people just can't stand them (and not just Monkey). I never really understood elitism, but I do know I don't like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 04, 2005 4:14 pm Dave, you never get annoyed by people going around screaming "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION RULES!!!!!!!!! it is teh best anime evar!!!!!!!"? Just because you tolerate something doesn't mean it can't piss you off.

[]: Re: Monkey's ire             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed May 04, 2005 4:56 pm Dave wrote: OR: How I learned to stop worrying and love the Fans. Are some fans a little 'too' enthuisiastic about this show? Is wanting to be stranded alone on a desert Island with Anno just plain wrong? Do those blithering idiots who dress up as the NERV bridge crew ruin it for the rest of us? Or are some people just too easily offended? Personally, I have no problem with fans who are obsessed to the point of insanity; hell, I'm practically there myself. Its not as if the 100+ Shinji/Rei fanfics they wrote actually alter the very fabric of space a time, rewriting the scripts to the show. However, some people just can't stand them (and not just Monkey). I never really understood elitism, but I do know I don't like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 04, 2005 6:07 pm One recurring problem at the AnimeNation forums, anyway, is the bashing of Evangelion fans. The problem is, the type of fans being bashed are not the type who normally hang out at the forum. They're the ones who go around screaming "omg eva is teh best anime evar!!!!!" and generally make complete idiots of themselves by spouting all of this garbage that pisses the fans of other series off. Thus, these people feel like they have good reason to go into our forum and bitch about how much they hate Eva fans. The less mindful fans make the more sophisticated ones look bad. We have to deal with the crap that arises because of their behavior. And that's really not fair. I don't need that shit.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed May 04, 2005 6:25 pm Reichu wrote: The less mindful fans make the more sophisticated ones look bad. We have to deal with the crap that arises because of their behavior. And that's really not fair. I don't need that shit.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed May 04, 2005 6:53 pm Is wanting to be stranded alone on a desert Island with Anno just plain wrong?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 04, 2005 6:54 pm I must confess, I am still blissfully ignorent of all these problems. Are people bashing eva in the Animenation forums? Are there really annoying Eva fans about? I'm either a dullard, or just plain lucky.

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Wed May 04, 2005 6:57 pm Ofcoarse all people have the right to post - that doesn't make them interesting in any respect though. Shit yeah, they are really annoying. Hell, I can easily be considered a n00b but you don't see me typing assidine reports of how fucking great eva is. We all know how great it is, we don't need it repeated over and over. I am the type of person who researches something before i dive in. Others tend to type up a storm as soon as they find a single forum. This is annoying. Yet, once again, they do have the right - that just isn't the point.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 04, 2005 7:36 pm OMF, you missed out on some great times. Fortunately there haven't been any fanboy wars since you arrived, but they have happened, and they were annoying. I hate having to pay for someone else's idiocy. Again, I tolerate the morons, but I still wish they'd go away. (Fortunately, most of them are ADD, so they usually do.)

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 04, 2005 7:39 pm Fanboys Wars eh? Another subset of that great net phenomenon know as Flame Wars! It's always fun to read flame wars though, but never to write them. Perhaps the next one will arrive soon and singe my unblemished fingers! :E

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 04, 2005 7:58 pm Flame wars are lame, stupid, and never fun. Hence that image I constantly repost.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed May 04, 2005 8:42 pm I'll take any Fanboy on, anytime. Bring on the Fanboy wars, I AM SO READY!!!oneone`1111 Oh, and: Eva is t3h r0x0r~!!!!112nromfg. Leave the poor children who can't spell "the" alone; being an annoying fan is fun!

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu May 05, 2005 10:03 am Did we even have any? I think the only one I really remeber was a discussion over Rei vs Asuka (That I began btw) that got a little hot at times... Then again I did post for about 2 months, left and came back 4 months later... so something could have happened in that time.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 05, 2005 11:03 am Trotsky was interesting to argue with while he was here. He gave up too easily.

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Thu May 05, 2005 1:36 pm What was his argument?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu May 05, 2005 2:28 pm That everyone in the story was certifiably autistic, and something about Anno producing a Satanic gospel (or was that me?)

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Thu May 05, 2005 4:02 pm Let all who wants to post, do so, the internet afterall was created for the populis of earth(soon to die) so even if you have an IQ of -1, go for it! And I enjoy flame wars! I said it and Ill do so again! I enjoy flame wars! Yes it's funny to read, but it's even more fun to start and finish, just to spice things up a bit, get people pissed(and hopefully continue the time honoured tradition) and get everuthing thats pissing you off out of your system, or atleast until you get worked up again.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu May 05, 2005 4:06 pm Titus wrote: And I enjoy flame wars! I said it and Ill do so again! I enjoy flame wars!

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Thu May 05, 2005 4:12 pm Bring it on! I have no mercy anymore! - today I get banned!

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Thu May 05, 2005 4:40 pm Ah yes, now it all seems so clear. *reccolections occuring*
